title: clerodendrum fugitans
intro: Clerodendrum fugitans, also known as the Hawaiian glorybush or white flower glorybush, is a flowering plant native to the island of Hawaii. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Hawaiian medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Clerodendrum fugitans include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
